observations.polarity: Death as immediate and foundational vs. Life as struggle and ascent
observations.summary: The passage presents death not as a distant event but as the immediate 'sea' in which one stands, while life is framed as a struggle supported by the earth, symbolizing foundation and ascent.

left_evidence.quote: "Look at the war within you. Look at the wars between peoples. Death is not a distant shore. It is the very sea in which you are standing at this moment."

right_evidence.quote: "And I am the very earth those mountains are rooted in, boy. Your struggle is my foundation. Every step you take upward is a step I must sustain."

accepted_observations.summary: The passage presents death not as a distant event but as the immediate 'sea' in which one stands, while life is framed as a struggle supported by the earth, symbolizing foundation and ascent.

left_evidence.quote: Look at the war within you. Look at the wars between peoples. Death is not a distant shore. It is the very sea in which you are standing at this moment

right_evidence.quote: And I am the very earth those mountains are rooted in, boy. Your struggle is my foundation. Every step you take upward is a step I must sustain
